pkgmetadata.longdescription: [plum] PackUnpack Memory.. image httpsreadthedocs.orgprojectsplum-pybadgeversionlatest target httpsplum-py.readthedocs.ioenlatestbadgelatest alt Documentation StatusThe plum-py Python package provides classes and utility functions totransform byte sequences into Python objects and back. While similar inpurpose to Pythons standard library struct module, this packageprovides a larger set of format specifiers and is extensible, allowingyou to easily create complex ones of your own.
